title: rosa acicularis var. gmelinii
intro: Rosa acicularis var. gmelinii, also known as the prickly rose, is a perennial shrub native to North America, characterized by its thorny stems and fragrant, pale pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa acicularis var. gmelinii include its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even help to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. In herbal preparations, Rosa acicularis var. gmelinii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
